summary: Attention Engine V2 Testing Complete - All 15 features verified. The unified computeAttention function correctly scores programs, drives Hero/Priority Board/Coming Up/Kanban views, and the CRITICAL Florida Atlantic test passes (Due today → Coming Up Soon, NOT On Track).
critical_code_review_comments: computeAttention.js SCORING LOGIC: CORRECT - coach signals +100/+90, due date -1→+80 / 0→+70 / 1→+50 / ≤3→+30, activity ≥7d→+40 / ≥3d→+20, stage bonus
computeAttention.js CRITICAL RULE: CORRECT - Lines 52-55 ensure daysUntil≤0 gets minimum score of 40 (medium attention)
computeAttention.js ATTENTION LEVELS: CORRECT - ≥80→high, ≥40→medium, else low
PipelinePage.js: CORRECT - Uses computeAllAttention as single source of truth, derives heroItems/timelineItems/attentionMap
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attention Engine V2 fully verified. CRITICAL: Florida Atlantic University (with next_action_due=today, daysUntil=0) correctly appears in 'Coming Up Soon' (medium attention) section, NOT 'On Track'. The computeAttention function ensures score≥40 when daysUntil≤0. All views (Hero, Peek, Timeline, Priority Board, Kanban) use the same computed attention state.

verified_features.1_hero_shows_non_low_items: PASS - Hero only shows high/medium attention items (5 items)
verified_features.2_hero_carousel_navigation: PASS - prev/next buttons work, counter updates correctly (1/5 → 2/5 → 1/5)
verified_features.3_hero_filter_pills: PASS - All (5), Attention (5) filters work; Momentum pill hidden when 0 medium items
verified_features.4_peek_row: PASS - Shows 'Also needs attention:' with 'School · Action' format
verified_features.5_coming_up_timeline: PASS - Shows items with daysUntil 0-3, Florida Atlantic with 'Due today'
verified_features.6_coming_up_de_emphasized: PASS - Uses muted styling (10px font, #cbd5e1 color)
verified_features.7_priority_board_groups: PASS - high→'Needs Attention' (5), medium→'Coming Up Soon' (1), low→'On Track' (1)
verified_features.8_critical_florida_atlantic: PASS - Florida Atlantic in 'Coming Up Soon' (medium), NOT in 'On Track'
verified_features.9_consistent_state: PASS - Florida Atlantic shows same state in Timeline, Priority Board, nowhere conflicting
verified_features.10_micro_signals: PASS - Found 7 micro-signals (Now overdue, Due today, New)
verified_features.11_priority_cards_3_line: PASS - Cards show: attention level + micro-signal, action text, timing + owner
verified_features.13_kanban_view: PASS - Renders with 5 columns, attention-based sorting, group headers
verified_features.14_kanban_dnd: PASS - Drag-drop infrastructure present (DragDropContext, Droppable, Draggable)

playwright_tests_performed: Hero shows only non-low items verification
CRITICAL: Florida Atlantic in Coming Up Soon, not On Track

florida_atlantic_verification.expected_behavior: Due today (daysUntil=0) → score≥40 → medium attention → 'Coming Up Soon'
florida_atlantic_verification.priority_board_coming_up_soon: FOUND with 'MED' label and 'Due today' timing
florida_atlantic_verification.conclusion: CRITICAL TEST PASSED - No conflicting labels
